Publish Your Bot on Finterion

Monetise your trading strategies — let investors subscribe to your algorithm

What is Finterion?

Finterion is a platform where algorithm developers can publish and sell their trading bots to investors. Once your strategy is performing well in backtests, you can deploy it on Finterion so that subscribers can allocate capital to your algorithm — and you earn fees on assets under management.

★ Visit Finterion →

How to Publish

1

Install the Plugin

pip install finterion-investing-algorithm-framework

2

Get Your API Key

Sign up on Finterion and grab the API key from the developer dashboard.

3

Register Components

Add the order executor, portfolio provider, and ping action.

4

Deploy & Earn

Deploy your algorithm. Investors can subscribe and allocate capital.

★ Get Started on Finterion →
